_note: Synthetic Federal Register documents. All html_urls live on the IANA-reserved federalregister.example.org host so nothing can resolve to a real rule (fixture-provenance rule). Field shapes mirror the live fields[] response, including a null abstract and null comments_close_on.

results.title: Interoperability Requirements for Small-Practice Health Records
results.abstract: This final rule requires certified health IT used by practices with fewer than 15 clinicians to expose standardized patient-record export APIs, with a staged compliance deadline.

agencies.name: Department of Health and Human Services

results.title: Proposed Data Portability Standards for Consumer Financial Applications
results.abstract: The Bureau proposes standards requiring consumer financial applications to support authorized third-party data portability, including machine-readable export of transaction histories.

results.title: Recordkeeping Modernization for Independent Freight Brokers
Proposed Accessibility Reporting Requirements for Online Scheduling Services
results.abstract: Proposes annual accessibility conformance reporting for online scheduling services used by public accommodations, with a small-entity phase-in.
